summary: Size Repository & Try-On Measurement Feature fully tested. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED - All CRUD operations for garment types, fits, sizes, lookup endpoint, and link-measurement PATCH work correctly. Frontend: All features verified - Admin Size Repository page loads with Jacket/Pants garment types, fit/size management, measurement field selection. Reseller Try-On mode shows garment cards, loads base measurements from API on size selection, adjustment +/- buttons work with 1/8 inch increments.
critical_code_review_comments: size_repository.py lines 51-59: GET /garment-types properly excludes _id from response
size_repository.py lines 62-91: PUT /garment-types does full replace with order preservation
size_repository.py lines 95-107: GET /sizes/{garment_id}/{fit_id} returns sorted sizes with _id excluded
size_repository.py lines 110-138: PUT /sizes/{garment_id}/{fit_id} does full replace for fit
size_repository.py lines 142-158: GET /lookup/{garment_id}/{fit_id}/{size} returns single size for Try-On
orders.py lines 306-337: PATCH /link-measurement saves both manual and tryon mode measurements
LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 83-88: Try-On state properly tracks garment selections and adjustments
LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 213-247: handleTryOnSelect loads base measurements from API and initializes adjustments
LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 249-259: handleAdjustmentStep correctly adds/subtracts 1/8 inch (0.125)
LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 262-311: handleSave correctly builds final measurements from base + adjustments
SizeRepositoryPage.jsx lines 160-177: generateSizes creates size rows based on fit range settings
SizeRepositoryPage.jsx lines 179-187: updateSizeMeasurement updates individual cell values
seed_data_creation: Created test WIP order 'Aju -- 747455' with Two Piece Suit - Jacket for testing Link Measurement flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Size Repository feature fully functional. Seeded data: Jacket (Slim/Regular, sizes 34-46) and Pants (Slim/Regular, sizes 28-42). Admin manages garment types at /admin/size-repository. Reseller accesses Try-On mode from Link Measurement page in WIP Orders. Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/size-repo/garment-types, GET/PUT /api/size-repo/sizes/{garment}/{fit}, GET /api/size-repo/lookup/{garment}/{fit}/{size}. PATCH /api/orders/{id}/link-measurement supports both 'manual' and 'tryon' measurement_mode.
